title: sciodaphyllum coclense
intro: Sciodaphyllum coclense, also known as the Coclense Scio, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Central America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sciodaphyllum coclense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. Sciodaphyllum coclense can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
